notes: Statistics panel now shows how many cards you own from the current deck
Collection ownership count only appears when 'In Collection' is enabled
'In Collection' toggle now defaults to off — enable it when you want to see what you own
Saved decks now show their generation settings (themes, bracket, budget, tempo, etc.)
Generation summary clears when you edit the deck
Fixed a bug with the tag file that affected deck generation from 4/6/26 - 4/8/26
Updated other parts of the app to respect scryfall's new cooldown policy
Optimizer now shows price difference for each swap
Deck optimizer values fetchlands less now
Clickable version label with patch notes (thats this!)
Fixed ban lists not applying during deck generation
